calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-28-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kimberly Carey for Petitioner.

The Court noted that the verification of the supplement was filed. The Court granted the Second and Final Account and Report of Administrator and Petition for Its Settlement, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-18-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Sep-21-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kimberly Carey for Jolynn Diepenbroek.

Ms. Carey stated that she has concern about the Beneficiaries paying their own taxes, that she is willing to pay the taxes from the Estate and spoke of the benefit to one the beneficiaries stating that he has a capital loss. The Court informed Ms. Carey that will require setting a reserve on the tax liability. Ms. Carey also stated that her extraordinary time is almost double the amount of her ordinary time, that she can submit a revised order, that she would like to do a preliminary distribution and that she will not be paying the tax until 2018. The Court granted the Amended First and Final Account and Report, etc. (subject to receipt and review of a revised order for preliminary distribution).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-05-2017 Continued To May-08-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Adminstrator and the Attorney to appear on May 8, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration has not been filed. Status on close of the Estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
